ports.notes: Standard SSH. No unusual auth methods.
Java web app. X-Powered-By: pac4j-jwt/6.0.3. Title: Principal Internal Platform - Login. Redirects / to /login. 404 returns JSON.

remote_access.notes: Standard config. Potential target after credential discovery.

gaps.description: Web application content behind auth not yet enumerated

oracle_recommendations.action: Exploit CVE-2026-29000 to forge admin JWT and access platform
oracle_recommendations.rationale: pac4j-jwt 6.0.3 confirmed vulnerable. RSA public key retrieved from /api/auth/jwks. Pre-auth, no creds needed, public PoCs available.

oracle_recommendations.action: After admin access, enumerate /api/users and /api/settings for SSH credentials or keys
oracle_recommendations.rationale: Platform mentions SSH certificate authentication and deployment management. Admin panel likely contains user creds or SSH keys.
